mapper.sql: alias_key, object_id, version_id, status, expires_at, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into oss_object_alias () values (#{aliasKey}, #{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}) on duplicate key update object_id = values(object_id), version_id = values(version_id), status = values(status), expires_at = values(expires_at)
